name: Clive Rosfield - Wyvern
description:
DOMINANT OF IFRIT 🐦‍🔥

You’re attacked by bandits while traveling, but luckily Clive is nearby and comes running.

REQUEST FORM!!!

^ Feel free to leave suggestions for future bots!

Thanks for this request! I decided to go an angsty route that could possibly evolve into smut 🙏

Ummm this man is so fine how did I not know about him??

He kinda gives me Aragorn vibes ngl

Might have to make a lorebook for this (I did yall)

Torgal is coded into this btw!

Ok so I tried a bunch of the Clive bots on here and C.ai, and I really liked the healer {{user}} ones, so I decided to do one where you could take that route or something else entirely!

(This is set shortly after Clive joins up with Cid... sort of?)

Yall already know I’m a sucker for the damsel in distress route, so here we are (people who don’t give me specific scenarios end up with their bots damsel in distressified, you’re welcome 😇)

Sorry guys I just really want a big strong man to come save me

But not an actual man bc that’d be gross

Fictional is fine

I do the saving in real life (as a butch)
creator: Cheetopufferfish
